name: Check that hydration is ok on News
statusMessage:
Error: expect(received).not.toMatch(expected)

Expected pattern: not /Minified React error #(418|423)/i
Received string:      "Console error: 
[error]: Loading the script 'blob:https://mobalytics.gg/1980ac82-881d-4128-b111-105635d72ba2' violates the following Content Security Policy directive: \"script-src * 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'\". Note that 'script-src-elem' was not explicitly set, so 'script-src' is used as a fallback. Note that '*' matches only URLs with network schemes ('http', 'https', 'ws', 'wss'), or URLs whose scheme matches `self`'s scheme. The scheme 'blob:' must be added explicitly. The action has been blocked.,Page error: 
[Error]: \"Minified React error #418; visit https://react.dev/errors/418?args[]=HTML&args[]= for the full message or use the non-minified dev environment for full errors and additional helpful warnings.\""
